summary: Fixed remaining mobile Works card overflow caused by implicit grid sizing and long unbroken card content.
changed: Added shrink-safe min-width behavior to the Works section, grid, link, card, media, and content stack.
Changed the Works mobile grid to an explicit one-column grid.
Added overflow wrapping to Works category, title, and excerpt content.
Added Playwright coverage for long unbroken content and extremely short mobile viewport heights.
intentionallyNotChanged: Desktop and tablet Works column counts
Unrelated local files and prior reports

validations.command: BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18080 NGINX_HTTPS_PORT=3002 docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build frontend nginx

PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PROFILE=exhaustive npx playwright test tests/ui-improvement-featured-works-grid.spec.ts --project=chromium-public --grep "Works cards do not overflow|Works stays aligned|Works collapses" --workers=1

PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PROFILE=exhaustive npx playwright test tests/ui-improvement-featured-works-grid.spec.ts --project=chromium-public --grep "Works card width stays stable" --workers=1

PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PROFILE=exhaustive npx playwright test tests/ui-improvement-featured-works-grid.spec.ts --project=chromium-public --workers=1

risks: Real backend content can vary, but the regression injects worst-case long unbroken content to cover this overflow path.
CI and main runtime promotion checks still need to pass after push.
recommendation: Push to dev, wait for CI, then promote to main with the runtime promotion flow.
